title: How To Print Labels Manually
description: Step-by-step instructions for manually generating and printing individual patient labels in Methasoft.

steps.title: Access Label Preparation
steps.directionHtml: Navigate to the Pharmacy menu located at the top of the screen. Locate and click the Label Preparation button.

steps.title: Set the Date
steps.directionHtml:
Locate the Take on After Date field.

Important: This date must be set to the day BEFORE the patient is scheduled to begin taking their bottles.

Example: If the patient is scheduled to start taking their bottles on 04/08/2026, this date should be set to 04/07/2026.

steps.title: Select the Patient
steps.directionHtml: Find and select the patient from the list.

steps.title: Select Labels to Print
steps.directionHtml: Check the boxes next to the labels you want to print.

steps.title: Preview Labels
steps.directionHtml: Click Preview to verify the label information is correct.

steps.title: Print
steps.directionHtml: Click Print to send the labels to the DYMO printer.
